name: complexity-analysis
summary: Big-O notation. Đo scalability, không absolute time. Time complexity + Space complexity.

facts.text: O(n): linear. O(log n): logarithmic. O(n²): quadratic
Big-O = worst case. Big-Theta = exact. Big-Omega = best case
O(1): không tăng theo input. O(n!): factorial — tránh bằng mọi giá

danger: ignore constant factors: O(n) với n=10 chậm hơn O(n²) với n=3
